title: mesosphaerum brachystachyum
intro: Mesosphaerum brachystachyum, also known as Dwarf Pennyroyal or Small-leaf Mosquito Plant, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its carminative and antispasmodic properties, which help to relieve digestive issues and reduce muscle spasms. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum brachystachyum include its ability to ease menstrual cramps, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Mesosphaerum brachystachyum is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
